mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal consumption expenditures signal robust consumer demand, driving corporate earnings and stock prices higher over the following month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or directional accuracy falls below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above the 4.5% threshold signals imminent labor market weakness, reducing consumer income and spending expectations, leading to negative equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: If UNRATE crosses 4.5% and forward 5-day returns are positive in more than 60% of such events over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production and nonfarm payrolls indicate broad economic expansion, supporting sustained corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: both series above their 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative forward 60-day returns in more than half of occurrences, or rolling 3-year Rank IC is non-positive.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, rising Federal funds rates increase discount rates and depress equity valuations, leading to negative forward returns over one month.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle (FEDFUNDS rising over 3 months)
failure_condition: In tightening cycles, FEDFUNDS increases are followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 40% of instances over any 3-year period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month decline in housing starts signals weakening residential investment and consumer confidence, leading to negative equity returns over the following month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines by more than 10% month-over-month
failure_condition: If the housing decline trigger produces positive 20-day returns in more than 50% of cases over any 2-year window, reject.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation is elevated and the Federal Reserve responds by raising rates, real earnings expectations deteriorate, compressing equity valuations and driving negative returns over one month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL YoY > 3% and FEDFUNDS increasing over 3 months
failure_condition: Combined signal fails to achieve negative median excess return over risk-free in triggered periods across any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate is below 4% (tight labor market), strong payroll growth raises wage pressure and inflation fears, causing negative equity returns within one week.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE below 4% and PAYEMS growth above 200k
failure_condition: In tight labor market regime, positive PAYEMS surprises produce positive 5-day returns more than 50% of the time over any 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strong manufacturing activity, which acts as a leading indicator for corporate profits and drives positive equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: Directional accuracy of weekly INDPRO growth predicting 5-day forward returns falls below 52% in any 3-year rolling window.
